critical_code_review_comments: Refactoring is textbook-clean: single source of truth, well-documented XML doc comments, sensible fallback (GetLangName / GetCultureCode default to English on unknown code), preserved declaration order. No issues found — safe to commit + push.

Minor nit (not a blocker): Loc.cs at 6415 lines exceeds the 700-line file-size guideline. Consider splitting per-language dicts into separate partial-class files (Loc.en.cs, Loc.ro.cs, ...) in a future cleanup — this would also make translation diffs per PR much clearer.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Static analysis only — sandbox has no .NET SDK / SQL Server / Gemini API key. Runtime validation must occur locally in VS2026 (dotnet build + run). If a next iteration is needed after user runs `dotnet build` locally, focus on any compile errors reported by MSBuild rather than re-doing this grep-based analysis.
